response: Headquartered in Austin, Texas, Acme Corp—an employer of 342 people—reported quarterly revenues of $12.3 million (Q1), $14.1 million (Q2), $11.8 million (Q3), and $16.2 million (Q4) for its most recent full fiscal year. These quarterly results add up to a total annual revenue of $54.4 million, marking an 18% year-over-year growth rate for the company.
